Description: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and put 2 of them into your hand. Discard the other cards.

Name: Morty's Conviction
Description: You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.Draw a card for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

Name: Salvatore
Description: Search your deck for a card that has no Abilities and evolves from 1 of your Pokémon, and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck. You can use this card on a Pokémon you put down when you were setting up to play or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

Name: Iron Leaves ex
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon. If you do, you may move any amount of Energy from your other Pokémon to this Pokémon.
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Gouging Fire ex
Effects: This Pokémon can't use Blaze Blitz again until it leaves the Active Spot.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Walking Wake ex
Ability-Effect: Damage from attacks used by this Pokémon isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 120 more damage.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Iron Crown ex
Ability-Effect: Attacks used by your Future Pokémon, except any Iron Crown ex, do 20 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance, or by any effects on those Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Iron Boulder ex
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon is damaged by an attack (even if it is Knocked Out), put 8 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Raging Bolt ex
Effects: Discard your hand and draw 6 cards.
You may discard any amount of Basic Energy from your Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each card you discarded in this way.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Bianca's Devotion
Description: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon that has 30 HP or less remaining.

Name: Eri
Description: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you discard up to 2 Item cards you find there.

Name: Morty's Conviction
Description: You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.Draw a card for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
